description: Girls Cable Knit Knee High Socks with Satin Bow. Knitted Socks - The perfect knee length socks for all day comfortable wear, whether at school or playing out. Style - Cable knit socks with adorable satin bow on the side, these are sure to become your littles ones favourite. Kids Sizes - UK 6-8.5 (EUR 23-26), UK 9-12 (EUR 27-30), UK 12.5-3.5 (EUR 31-36). Material - Made from 78% Cotton 20% Polyester 2% Elastane. These socks benefit from being silky-soft to the touch, breathable and very easy to care for. Essential - Available in 6 colours, these socks are perfect for everyday wear and any occasion.
